raw_indiamart.dealsIn: Seal Tag, Security Seals, Bag Seals, Cable Seals, Bolt Seals, Lead Seals, Meter Seals, Plastic Seals, Truck Seals, Wire Seals, Seal Plier, Padlock Seals, Drum Cap Seal, Container Seals, Polycarbonate Seals
raw_indiamart.address: Jhas Industries, Agra Road, Patel Nagar
raw_indiamart.companyDescription: Since our inception in the year 1949 as Jhas Industries an ISO : 9001 : 2015 & ISO -14001 : 2015 certified sole proprietorship organization, we have gained more than sixty years of vast experience with explicitly defined objective of Manufacturing, Exporting and Suppliers large assortment of Security Seals, Plastic Seals, Polycarbonate Seals, Meter Seals, Wire Seals, Lead Seals etc. Our products are extensively used for security applications and are highly appreciated for their tamper proof attributes. Our vast range of quality seals finds applications in energy distribution, forestry, judiciary, meter manufacturing, inspection, and many more.

citations.title: Jhas Industries - Manufacturer from Aligarh, India | About Us

basis.reasoning: The discovery chain started from the Instagram profiles which listed external URLs to the company website and a Linktree page. The Linktree URL was recorded as a discovered link. The IndiaMART profile contained a facebookurl field that pointed to the official Facebook page, establishing another link in the chain. Both LinkedIn company pages listed the official website (and an alternate domain) as external links, completing the chain of cross‑referenced digital footprints.
Multiple authoritative sources (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, IndiaMART, Justdial) explicitly state the company name as "Jhas Industries" and locate it in Aligarh, matching the ground‑truth data.

citations.title: Jhas Industries - Manufacturer from Aligarh, India | About Us
Jhas Industries in Patel Nagar, Aligarh
Jhas Industries - JUST HAVE A SEAL - WHATEVER | WHEREVER | WHENEVER

basis.reasoning: All identified digital platforms were examined and matched against the provided ground‑truth fields. For each platform the validated fields, evidence excerpts, status, discovered external links, URL and platform name were recorded.

During the investigation no official YouTube, Pinterest, or X (Twitter) accounts were found that could be definitively linked to Jhas Industries. The presence of hashtag mentions on X does not constitute a verified corporate account. The Linktree URL discovered may host additional profiles, but it was not expanded.

chain.reason: Instagram profile jhasindustries includes external_url to the official website
Instagram profile jhas_industries includes external_url to a Linktree page
IndiaMART profile lists facebookurl that points to the Facebook page
LinkedIn company page links back to the official website
LinkedIn alternate page links to an alternate domain (http://jhas.in/)

evidence: "About (shows address): Patel Nagar, Agra Road, Aligarh - 202001 UP"

"address: Jhas Industries, Agra Road, Patel Nagar"
"Opposite Chiranjilal Girls College, Agra Road, Patel Nagar, Aligarh-202001, Uttar Pradesh"
